message:
test(goldens): add concrete metamorphic search golden snapshots

Companion goldens for tests/golden_metamorphic_search.rs
(introduced in commit dc585fe7). The golden harness freezes the
concrete output of the deterministic 3-agent × 5-conversation ×
3-message corpus at the pinned timestamp 1_768_435_200_000 so any
ranking / tokenization / filter regression surfaces as an exact
diff. This commit adds the actual JSON files that the harness
compares against:

- agent_filter_breakdown.json: hit counts per agent
  ({claude, codex, amp}) when searching with an agent filter —
  proves agent-exclusive filtering behaves as the MR8 invariant
  expects, and that the actual count per agent is stable across
  runs.
- case_invariance.json: lower/upper hit counts and `sets_equal`
  booleans for the three case-invariance query pairs
  (async/ASYNC, refactoring/REFACTORING, debugging/DEBUGGING).
  Locks in the MR6 invariant with concrete counts so a
  case-insensitive-tokenizer change won't pass silently.
- corpus_shape.json: expected indexed-doc count, total
  conversations, and per-agent document counts — the "did we
  build the fixture we thought we built" smoke check.
- days_filter_staircase.json: hit counts at the 7-day and 30-day
  windows used by the MR5 subset check, so any change to the
  created_from filter's boundary behavior is visible.
- limit_prefix_ordering.json: the first N hits at limit=5, 10, 15
  with their shard/doc ids, so a ranking reshuffle shows up in the
  diff even if total counts are unchanged (this is the
  "invariants passed but behavior changed" failure mode the
  golden harness was designed to catch).

Regenerate with
`UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --test golden_metamorphic_search`,
review with `git diff tests/golden/metamorphic/`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+{
+  "query": "metamorphic_sentinel",
+  "unfiltered_total": 45,
+  "per_agent_filtered": {
+    "amp": 15,
+    "claude": 15,
+    "codex": 15
+  },
+  "union_count": 45,
+  "union_equals_total": true
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+{
+  "case_pairs": [
+    {
+      "lower": "async",
+      "upper": "ASYNC",
+      "lower_count": 15,
+      "upper_count": 15,
+      "sets_equal": true
+    },
+    {
+      "lower": "refactoring",
+      "upper": "REFACTORING",
+      "lower_count": 15,
+      "upper_count": 15,
+      "sets_equal": true
+    },
+    {
+      "lower": "debugging",
+      "upper": "DEBUGGING",
+      "lower_count": 15,
+      "upper_count": 15,
+      "sets_equal": true
+    }
+  ]
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+{
+  "query": "metamorphic_sentinel",
+  "unfiltered_count": 45,
+  "days_30_count": 24,
+  "days_7_count": 6,
+  "days_7_subset_of_30": true,
+  "monotonic": true
+}
\ No newline at end of file
